name: Merciful Nurturing
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: Hand Limit +2. At turn end, gain Keyflare equal to [StateArg1]% of the wielder's Keyflare Regen. Each time a Posse is released, all Awakeners gain [StateArg2] Aliemus. If the current Realm is {Caro}, it also increases {Embryo Fusion} by +[StateArg3]%.

name: Tablet of Scriptures
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Shield Generation +[StateArg1]%, and HP Recovery +[StateArg1]%. At the end of odd turns, the wielder's Crit. Rate + [StateArg2]%, gaining [StateArg3] Aliemus; at the end of even turns, the wielder's Crit. DMG increases by [StateArg2]%, gaining [StateArg4] Keyflare. If the current realm is {Caro}, the maximum accumulation of the {Crimson Furnace} is increased by [StateArg5]%.

name: Winter's Requiem
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: At the start of battle, apply 2 stacks of {Vulnerable} to front-row enemies. At turn start, enemies affected by {Vulnerable} lose Temporary {STR} equal to the wielder's ATK [StateArg1]%. If the current Realm is {Caro}, after the wielder releases Exalt, {Embryo Fusion} +[StateArg2]%.

name: By Rose Alone
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: For every instance of DMG dealt by the wielder, there is a [StateArg3]% chance for the wielder to gain 2% Temporary Crit. DMG. After the wielder releases Exalt, they deal Active DMG 3 times to a random enemy equal to [StateArg1]% of the wielder's ATK. If the current realm is {Caro}, for every {Embryo} devoured, {Embryo Fusion} increases by +[StateArg2]%.

name: Chains Unbound
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The Base DMG dealt by the wielder's cards is increased by [StateArg1]%. At turn start, there is a [StateArg2]% chance to generate a random card of the wielder into the hand with added {Exhaust}. If the current realm is {Caro}, using {Embryo} on the wielder increases the Crit. Rate of the wielder's next Strike card's DMG this turn by +[StateArg3]%.

name: Drowning in Crimson
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Base DMG increases by [StateArg1]%. Before Exalt, Temporary hand size +1, draw 1 Command Card. In {Caro} realm, triggering {Devour} temporarily increases Crit. DMG by [StateArg1]%, once per turn

name: Pale Descendant
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Shield Generation +[StateArg3]%; the wielder's Defense inflicts [StateArg1]% of {Poison} on the enemy with the highest HP. If the current realm is {Caro}, when applying {Poison}, {Embryo Fusion} increases by [StateArg2]%. This effect triggers up to 3 times per turn.

name: Bloody Feast
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The Crit. Rate and Crit. DMG of the wielder's Exalt are increased by [StateArg2]%. After the wielder releases Exalt, they gain {STR} equal to their CON [StateArg1]%. If this Exalt triggers the {Devour} effect, they gain additional 1 instance of {STR}.

name: The Glutton's Tale
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Healing effect is increased by [StateArg2]%. At turn start, gain Temporary {STR} and Shield equal to [StateArg1]% of the HP lost last turn.

name: Lullaby Devoured
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After the battle starts, gain a {Counter} equal to [StateArg1]% of the wielder's DEF. After triggering {Death Resistance}, gain up to 2 stacks of "Cradle": all friendly units' shield and HP Recovery increase by [StateArg2]%, removing 1 stack at turn end. If the current realm is {Caro}, after triggering {Death Resistance}, {Embryo Fusion} increases by +[StateArg3]%.

name: Kiss of Repose
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Base DMG +[StateArg1]% During this exploration, every time the wielder kills an enemy, their Crit. Rate +2% and Exalt Base DMG +[StateArg2]%, up to 10 times. If the current Realm is {Caro}, the wielder gains an extra [StateArg4] Aliemus when they directly consume {Embryo} (cooldown 3 turns).

name: Paradoxical Realism
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Aliemus and {STR} Generation +[StateArg1]%. After unleashing Exalt, the Final DMG, Shield, and Healing from other Awakeners' Exalts this turn +[StateArg2]%. If this Exalt triggered {Devour}, the wielder gains [StateArg3] Aliemus.

name: Vain Regrets
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The Fixed {Poison} & {Poison} Trigger effects caused by the wielder +[StateArg1]%. {Caro} Realm's automatic {Embryo Fusion} +[StateArg2]%. When the wielder first triggers {Resonance} each turn, other Awakeners gain [StateArg3] Aliemus.

name: Rewinding Time
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After playing the wielder's Command Card, there is a [StateArg1]% chance to return it to your hand from the Discard Pile. This effect can only trigger once per turn.

name: Deathless Ascent
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The healing caused by the wielder's Command Card is increased by [StateArg2]%. Before the wielder releases Exalt, other Awakeners gain [StateArg1] Aliemus. If your team is in a {Vulnerable} state, the effect is doubled.

name: Manikin of Oblivion
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Aliemus, {Poison}, and HP Recovery effects are increased by [StateArg1]%. After the wielder unleashes Exalt, they gain Aliemus equal to [StateArg2]% of the Aliemus consumed.

name: Heart of a Knight
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The shield generated by the wielder's Exalt is increased by [StateArg2]%. After the wielder releases Exalt, they obtain Temporary {STR} equal to [StateArg1]% of the wielder's DEF. If your team is in a {Fragile} state, the effect is doubled.

name: Celestial Beast
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The Base DMG of the wielder's Strike and Exalt is increased by [StateArg1]%. After the wielder uses Strike, they gain a 5% Temporary Crit. Rate, stacking up to 3 times per turn. Upon reaching 3 stacks, they gain 15% Temporary Crit. DMG.

name: Hour of Fortune
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: At the start of battle, the wielder's Command Card Crit. Rate + [StateArg1]% for each relic possessed. After using Exalt, roll a 4-sided die; the wielder gains Aliemus and Temporary Crit. DMG equal to [StateArg2] times the roll result. If the roll is 4 or higher, other Awakeners also gain half.

name: Aberrant Devour
descriptionTemplate:
Team Unique: Exalt Base DMG +[StateArg1]%. At the start of exploration, the wielder enters the Scholar Persona. Using Exalt switches the wielder between the Scholar and Jester Personas.
Scholar: Gain [StateArg2] Aliemus at turn end.
Jester: Crit. Rate and Crit. DMG +[StateArg3]% at turn end.

name: Memory Spiral
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Shield Generation +[StateArg1]%. At turn start, {Retain} [StateArg2]% of the remaining Shield, up to [StateArg3]% of Max HP.

name: Gift of Decay
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's {Poison} effect is increased by [StateArg1]%. Before the wielder releases an Exalt, they first apply {Poison} equal to [StateArg2]% of their ATK to all enemies. After using a Posse, the wielder gains [StateArg3] Aliemus.

name: Drifting in Desire
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's {Counter} is increased by [StateArg3]%. For each attack received, gain Temporary {STR} equal to [StateArg1]% of the wielder's ATK. After the wielder uses Exalt, gain {Counter} equal to [StateArg2]% of the wielder's ATK.

name: Grace Through Pain
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's {Poison} and Shield Generation +[StateArg3]%. the wielder's Strike Crit. Rate and Crit. DMG increase by [StateArg1]%, and gain a Shield equal to [StateArg2]% of Max HP. The Shield Effect can only activate once per turn.

name: Will Unyielding
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's base DMG and Shield increase by [StateArg1]%. At the start of exploration, add one of the wielder's Strike and one Defense to the deck. After the wielder plays Defense, the next Strike's Crit. Rate and Crit. DMG increase by 15%. After the wielder plays Strike, the next Defense's Shield increases by 15%. Can stack up to 3 times.

name: Silent Banquet
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: Increases the wielder's {Poison} DMG by [StateArg3]%. After using Exalt, restores health equal to [StateArg1]% of the wielder's Constitution, plus additional health equal to [StateArg2]% of the wielder's Constitution for each remaining Arithmetica.

name: Wheel Unseen
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: Keyflare Cap +100%. Hand Limit +2, cannot stack with other WoDs with the same effect. Increases the wielder's Keyflare Regen by [StateArg1]%. After the wielder plays a card, in this turn, the Crit. Rate, Crit. DMG, Shield Generation, Aliemus Generation, and {STR} Generation of the wielder's Command Cards +[StateArg2]%, stacking up to 5 times.

name: Amber-Tinted Death
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Base DMG dealt +[StateArg1]%, and {STR} Generation +[StateArg2]%. After playing the wielder's Command Card, gain Temporary {STR} equal to [StateArg3]% of the wielder's ATK, triggering up to 5 times per turn.

name: Doomsday Rampage
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Exalt and {Pursuit} Base DMG +[StateArg1]%. After playing any Awakener's Strike this turn, the wielder's Strike DMG temporarily +[StateArg2]% of the wielder's ATK. This effect triggers up to 8 times per turn.

name: Fouetté
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Active DMG is increased by an amount equal to the wielder's ATK ×[StateArg3]%. After playing or discarding 1 of the wielder's Command Cards, deal DMG equal to the wielder's ATK ×[StateArg1]% as {Poison} to a random enemy once. After the {Ultra Round} ends, there is a [StateArg2]% chance to trigger 100% {Poison} on all enemies.

name: Treasured Rarity
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: Gain [StateArg1] Black Sigils each time an enemy dies. After the wielder kills an enemy, the wielder's Crit. DMG in this level permanently increases by [StateArg2]%, stacking up to 5 stacks. Each time the wielder triggers the {Leap} effect, increase the Final DMG dealt by the wielder this turn by [StateArg3]%, stacking up to 3 stacks.

name: Song of the Bound
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: At the start of exploration, add one {Insight} and the wielder's Strike to the deck. the wielder's Strike Base DMG increases by [StateArg1]%, and after playing, there is a [StateArg2]% chance to draw 1 card. This effect can trigger a maximum of once per turn. If the current Realm is {Ultra} and during the {Ultra Round}, the Strike will place 1 {Insight} into hand, triggering a maximum of once during that turn.

name: Queen's Edict
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's {Counter} Generation +[StateArg4]%. After playing a card, gain {Counter} equal to [StateArg1]% of the wielder's DEF, up to 2 times per turn. If the card played enters {Ultra Space}, the wielder also gains [StateArg2] Aliemus. After releasing Exalt, all enemies lose [StateArg3]% Temporary {STR} equal to the wielder's DEF.

name: Incalculable Factor
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The Aliemus generated by the wielder increases by [StateArg1]%. The wielder gains [StateArg2]  Keyflare after releasing Exalt.

name: The Last Verse
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Command Card Crit. Rate and Crit. DMG, Shield Generation, HP Recovery, Aliemus, and {STR} are increased by [StateArg1]%. If the current realm is {Ultra}, gain [StateArg2] Keyflare after releasing {Annihilation}. After entering the {Ultra Round}, the next Posse is released twice this turn.

name: Path Forsaken
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After the wielder deals DMG, there is a [StateArg1]% chance to draw 1 of their Command Cards and reduce its Arithmetica Cost by 1. This effect activates only once per turn.

name: Core Meltdown
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The Base DMG of the wielder's Strike is increased by 25%, and the base shield of Defense is increased by 25%. When playing the wielder's Strike, gain Temporary {STR} equal to the wielder's ATK [StateArg1]%, and when playing the wielder's Defense, gain Temporary {Alert} equal to the wielder's DEF [StateArg2]%. If the current realm is {Ultra}, receive a Temporary {STR} and Temporary {Alert} when entering the {Ultra Round}

name: Happy Magic Show
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After the wielder releases an Exalt, they gain [StateArg1] Aliemus and [StateArg2] Keyflare, repeating once for every 4 cards in hand. If the current Realm is {Ultra}, after the wielder's Cards enter {Ultra Space}, they gain Temporary {STR} equal to [StateArg3]% of the wielder's Attack, triggering up to 2 times per turn.

name: Unbearable Freedom
descriptionTemplate:
Team Unique: Hand Limit +2. Effects of the same type cannot stack. The wielder's Base DMG and Shield Generation are increased by [StateArg1]%.
Obtain [StateArg2] Aliemus upon entering the {Ultra Round}.
Release {Annihilation} to grant all Awakeners Temporary Crit. DMG +[StateArg3]%. This effect has a Cooldown of 3 turns.

name: Eternal Requiem
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: At the start of exploration, shuffle 1 "Silver Key Radiance" with {Destroy} into the Draw Pile. After releasing Posse, the wielder's Crit. DMG +[StateArg1]%. When the wielder deals DMG, gain Keyflare equal to [StateArg2]% of the wielder's Keyflare Regen and [StateArg3]% Temporary Crit. Rate, up to 5 times per turn.

name: Veiled Anguish
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Exalt Base DMG +[StateArg1]%, and Keyflare Regen +[StateArg2]. After entering {Ultra Round}, all Awakeners obtain [StateArg4] Aliemus. After releasing {Annihilation}, the wielder obtains [StateArg3] Aliemus.

name: Twisted Knight Ballad
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's cards gain +[StateArg1]% Base DMG and Crit. DMG. At the start of your turn and after using the wielder's Exalt, gain 1 stack of "Alight". When the wielder's Command Card is played, consume 1 stack to increase its Final DMG and Shield by [StateArg2]%. During an {Ultra Round}, gain "Ablaze" instead (effect doubled).

name: Special Training
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After unleashing a Posse, the wielder's Crit. Rate is temporarily increased by [StateArg1]%.

name: School Day
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After resetting stock at "D-Mark" and {Ashen Ruins}, the wielder gains [StateArg1] Aliemus.

name: Dear Papa Noel
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: Your first purchase of an "Orison" in the "D-Mark" store or your first purchase of a discounted item in the {Ashen Ruins} has a [StateArg1]% chance to cost 0 Black Sigils. This can trigger only once per Exploration.

name: Countdown Moment
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: At the start of exploration, add 1 card "Countdown Moment: 5" to the deck. "Countdown Moment: 5": Draw 1 card after played, shuffle the next "Countdown Moment" into the Discard Pile, {Destroy}. "Countdown Moment: 0": Draw 3 cards, gain 3 Arithmetica, and have a [StateArg1]% chance to shuffle "Countdown Moment: 5" into the Discard Pile, {Retain}, {Destroy}.

name: Stakes of Wisdom
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After exploration starts, shuffle 1 "Stakes of Wisdom" into the Draw Pile. "Stakes of Wisdom": Cost 1 Arithmetica. Shuffle all Command Cards in hand randomly into the Draw Pile. Shuffled Command Cards have a [StateArg1]% chance to take effect 1 additional time when played next, and for each Command Card shuffled in, all Awakeners gain 2 Aliemus. {Retain}. {Exhaust}. {Innate}.

name: Unsent Flowers
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: If the wielder is the Awakener "Ramona", the Affinity gained upon completing the stage is increased by [StateArg1]%.

name: Stepping Over the Muddy Roses
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: If the wielder is the Awakener "Ramona: Timeworn," the Affinity gained by other Awakeners upon completing the stage is increased by [StateArg1]%, but the wielder does not gain any Affinity.

name: Hymn of the Sovereign
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: At the start of battle, the wielder gains [StateArg1] Aliemus. Each time another Awakener releases Exalt, the wielder gains [StateArg2] Aliemus. If the current Realm is {Aequor}, after the wielder releases Exalt, they gain {Tentacle DMG} equal to [StateArg3]% of their Attack.

name: Shrouded Birth
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Shield Generation +[StateArg1]%. When generating Shield, all allies gain Temporary Crit. Rate of [StateArg3]% and Keyflare from the wielder's Keyflare Regen by [StateArg4]%, up to 2 times per turn. If the current realm is {Aequor}, each time a Tentacle attacks, the wielder gains 1 point of Aliemus, up to [StateArg2] per turn.

name: Amidst the Downpour
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Strike has a [StateArg1]% chance to gain 1 Arithmetica and trigger 10% {Poison} on all enemies; if the current Realm is {Aequor}, triggering this effect causes 1 Tentacle to attack once. This effect only activates once per turn.

name: Fin of Sorrow
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Shield and HP Recovery increase by [StateArg1]% of their CON. The wielder's {Counter} dealt +[StateArg3]%. After playing Defense, gain {Counter} equal to [StateArg4]% of their DEF. At the start of battle, gain {STR} equal to [StateArg2]% of their CON. If the current realm is {Aequor}, gain additional {Tentacle DMG} of the same amount.

name: Dream of the Sea
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After the wielder plays a card, the wielder gains 1 point of Aliemus. At the start of combat, gain [StateArg1]% of the wielder's Attack as {STR}, and if the current Realm is {Aequor}, additionally gain [StateArg2]% of {Tentacle DMG}. Subsequently, at the start of each following turn, gain [StateArg3]% of the wielder's Attack as {STR}, and if the current Realm is {Aequor}, additionally gain [StateArg4]% of {Tentacle DMG}.

name: Blade of the Titan
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After the wielder finishes using Exalt, their Crit. DMG is increased by [StateArg1]% for the rest of this turn. The wielder's cards in hand have a [StateArg2]% chance to reduce Arithmetica Cost by 1 this turn.

name: Power of the Pious
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Aliemus Generation +[StateArg1]%, and {Poison} +[StateArg2]%. After the wielder deals DMG, all Awakeners gain a Temporary Crit. DMG increase equal to [StateArg3]% of the wielder's Crit. DMG, effective up to 1 time per turn. If the current realm is {Aequor}, at the start of combat, both the Tentacle limit and the number of Tentacles increase by 1.

name: Death of Ms. Coral
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After playing the wielder's card, gain a Shield equal to [StateArg1]% of the wielder's Defense. For each Tentacle, increase the Shield by [StateArg2]% of the wielder's Defense. This effect triggers only once per turn.

name: Sail of Providence
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: Increases the wielder's HP Recovery by [StateArg1]%. After releasing Exalt, recover [StateArg2]% of lost HP at the start of next turn.

name: Flamebound Navigator
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The Shield caused by the wielder's Exalt increases by [StateArg1]%. After releasing Exalt, all Awakeners' Temporary Crit. DMG increases by [StateArg2]%, with each Tentacle increasing by 1%. After each exploration, trigger {Death Resistance} for the first time, restoring [StateArg3]% of Max HP at the start of next turn

name: Uteri Somnia
descriptionTemplate:
Team Unique: Hand Limit +2. Effects of the same type cannot stack. The wielder's Keyflare Regen and Exalt's Final DMG & Shield Generation +[StateArg1]%.
Switching to {Tranquil Sea} stance increases the wielder's Aliemus by [StateArg2], 3 turns cooldown.
Switching to {Raging Waves} stance inflicts [StateArg3] stacks of {Birth Ritual} on all enemies, 3 turns cooldown.

name: The Faraway Eden
descriptionTemplate:
Team Unique: Gain Aliemus equal to [StateArg1]% Base Aliemus at the sart of battle. The wielder's Exalt Final DMG increases by a percentage equal to [StateArg2]% of Base Aliemus.
When switching to the {Raging Waves} stance, gain Temporary Realm Mastery equal to [StateArg3]% of your current Realm Mastery. 3-turn cooldown.

name: Gluttony
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After a normal battle, you can choose to forgo an Orison and increase Max HP by [StateArg1]%. Takes effect up to 2 times. In {Astral Reign}, this effect changes to "Increases the chance for the wielder's Dimensional Image Relic to appear by 100%."

name: Frenzy
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The number of Relic Slots becomes 3, with one being a Cursed Relic Slot. Purchasing a Cursed Relic grants [StateArg1] Black Sigils. In {Astral Reign}, this effect changes to "Increases the chance for the wielder's Dimensional Image Relic to appear by 100%."

name: Favor
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After each stage starts, all Awakeners gain [StateArg1] Aliemus. At the start of a Boss Battle, draw 2 cards. In {Astral Reign}, this effect changes to "Increases the chance for the wielder's Dimensional Image Relic to appear by 100%."

name: Emerge
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: D-Mark Store refresh attempts +1, refresh cost reduced by [StateArg1] Black Sigils. In {Astral Reign}, this effect changes to "Increases the chance for the wielder's Dimensional Image Relic to appear by 100%."

name: Delirium
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: Reduce the cost of {Rouse} Cards in D-Mark Store by [StateArg1] Black Sigils. the wielder's {Rouse} card gains {Innate}. In {Astral Reign}, this effect changes to "Increases the chance for the wielder's Dimensional Image Relic to appear by 100%."

name: Whisper
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After each battle ends, the Awakener with the lowest Aliemus gains [StateArg1] Aliemus. In {Astral Reign}, this effect changes to "Increases the chance for the wielder's Dimensional Image Relic to appear by 100%."

name: Hope
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: Recover [StateArg1]% of lost HP after walking a new Tile. After using an Emergency Gnosis, increase all Awakeners' Crit. Rate and Crit. DMG by 100%. In {Astral Reign}, this effect changes to "Increases the chance for the wielder's Dimensional Image Relic to appear by 100%."

name: Epiphany
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After each stage starts, gain [StateArg1] Keyflare. At the start of a Boss Battle, gain 2 Arithmetica. In {Astral Reign}, this effect changes to "Increases the chance for the wielder's Dimensional Image Relic to appear by 100%."

name: Punishment
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After the Boss Battle starts, consume up to 50 Black Sigils, with each point of Black Sigil consumed granting [StateArg1]% {Death Resistance}. In the {Astral Reign}, the effect changes to "Increases the chance for the wielder's Dimensional Image Relic to appear by 100%."

name: Blessing
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After a normal battle ends, the number of available Orisons becomes 4. Orisons on the wielder's cards has a [StateArg1]% chance to upgrade to Advanced. In {Astral Reign}, this effect changes to "Increases the chance for the wielder's Dimensional Image Relic to appear by 100%."

name: Vitality
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: Rest Areas provide an additional option: {Destroy} up to 3 Symptom cards, obtain [StateArg1] Black Sigils. In {Astral Reign}, this effect changes to "Increases the chance for the wielder's Dimensional Image Relic to appear by 100%."

name: Exile
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: Symptom Cards can be sold for [StateArg1] Black Sigils. In {Astral Reign}, this effect changes to "Increases the chance for the wielder's Dimensional Image Relic to appear by 100%.".

name: Suction
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: Increases the HP Recovery at Rest Areas by [StateArg1]%. After choosing to recover HP, add 2 {Insight} cards to the deck. In {Astral Reign}, this effect changes to "Increases the chance for the wielder's Dimensional Image Relic to appear by 100%."

name: Aged
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After each battle ends, gain [StateArg1] Keyflare. In {Astral Reign}, this effect changes to "Increases the chance for the wielder's Dimensional Image Relic to appear by 100%."

name: Greed
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After each stage starts, gain [StateArg1] Black Sigils. Relic Capacity +2. In {Astral Reign}, this effect changes to "Increases the chance for the wielder's Dimensional Image Relic to appear by 100%."

name: Insight
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: Vision +1 during exploration, gain [StateArg1] Black Sigil after the map is fully revealed. At the start of Boss Battles, {Weakness} and {Vulnerable} all enemies for 1 turn. In the {Astral Reign}, the effect is changed to "Increases the chance for the wielder's Dimensional Image Relic to appear by 100%."

name: Duty's Gravitas
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After the wielder triggers Exalt, all allies gain [StateArg1] Aliemus.

name: Elevated Focus
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After triggering Posse, the wielder gains [StateArg1] Aliemus.

name: Cursed Binding
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's {Poison} inflicted is increased by [StateArg1]%. Strike deals DMG equal to [StateArg2]% of the attacker's ATK as {Poison}. This effect can trigger a maximum of 3 times per turn.

name: Sever and Scar
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Strike causes the target enemy to lose Temporary {STR} equal to [StateArg1]% the wielder's ATK. This effect can trigger a maximum of 3 times per turn.

name: Cloaked in the Night
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's {Counter} is increased by [StateArg1]%. Defense grants Temporary {Counter} equal to the wielder's DEF [StateArg2]%. In Boss Battles, this becomes 3 times the Temporary {Counter}. After {Death Resistance} triggers, deals {Fixed DMG} equal to the wielder's {Counter} stack count [StateArg3]% to all enemies.

name: Adventurer's Pack
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After playing the wielder's Defense, gain Temporary {STR} equal to [StateArg1]% the wielder's ATK.

name: Analysis of Death
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After killing an enemy, the wielder gains [StateArg1] Aliemus and 1% Crit. DMG, effective for the entire exploration.

name: To My Dearest Friend
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After the wielder uses Exalt, all allies' Crit. Rate + [StateArg1]% this turn.

name: Memory Syndrome
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After playing a Symptom card, the wielder gains [StateArg1] Aliemus. This effect triggers up to 2 times per turn. After playing a Command Card, the wielder gains 1 Aliemus.

name: Mind Barrier
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After Exalt, gain Shield equal to [StateArg1]% of the wielder's DEF.

name: Critical Point
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After dealing Damage, the wielder's Crit. Rate + [StateArg1]%. After a critical hit, the Crit. Rate gained from this effect is reset.

name: Nobleman's Staff
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: Increases the base Exalt DMG of the wielder by [StateArg1]%, and increases shield and HP Recovery by [StateArg2]%.

name: Data is Flesh
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: Increase the Base DMG of the wielder's Command Card by [StateArg1]%, and increase Shield and HP Recovery by [StateArg2]%.

name: Moment of Reunion
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: Each time a card of the wielder is played, gain [StateArg1] Keyflare. This effect can trigger up to 3 times per turn.

name: The Land of Nonexistence
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: At the start of exploration, add one Defense of the wielder to the deck, increasing the Shield of the wielder's Defense by [StateArg1]%.

name: Hand of Oblivion
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: At the start of exploration, add one Strike of the wielder to the deck, increasing the Base DMG of the wielder's Strike by [StateArg1]%.

name: 35mm Magic
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The Shields and {Poison} caused by the wielder increase by [StateArg1]%. Each time {Death Resistance} is triggered, all Awakeners gain [StateArg2]% Temporary Crit. Rate and Crit. DMG.

name: The Gaze of Isarawu
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: Increases the wielder's Shield and {Counter} by [StateArg1]%. When attacked, there is a [StateArg2]% chance for all Awakeners to gain 1 Aliemus.

name: Man in the Mirror
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: At turn end, the wielder gains [StateArg1] Aliemus. When taking DMG, gain Shield equal to [StateArg2]% of the DMG at the start of next turn. If the current Realm is {Caro}, gain {Crimson Furnace} Healing equal to [StateArg2]% of the DMG instead.

name: Silver Cod's Determination
descriptionTemplate:
Team Unique: The wielder enters the Silver Cod persona after exploration begins. Switch between the Silver Cod and Cat personas after using Exalt.
Silver Cod: Gain [StateArg1] Keyflare after dealing Damage. Cat: Gain a Temporary Crit. DMG increase of +[StateArg2]% after dealing Damage. These effects share a maximum of 5 triggers per turn.

name: Til the Snow Melts
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Base DMG increases by [StateArg1]%. At the start of the battle, the wielder gains 25 stacks of "Snow". Playing a card grants 2 Aliemus and removes 1 stack. Once all "Snow" stacks are removed, the wielder gains [StateArg2]% Crit. Rate.

name: Deep Sea's Call
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After the battle starts, gain {STR} equal to [StateArg1]% of the wielder's ATK. If the current realm is {Aequor}, also increase {Tentacle DMG} by [StateArg2]% of the wielder's ATK.

name: Kiss of Farewell
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After the wielder releases Exalt, they gain {STR} equal to [StateArg1]% of the wielder's ATK. If the current Realm is {Caro}, after releasing Exalt, {Embryo Fusion} increases by +[StateArg2]%.

name: Poetic Bygone Days
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: At the start of battle, draw 1 Command Card of the wielder and have a [StateArg1]% chance to reduce its Arithmetica Cost by 1. Each time {Death Resistance} is triggered, this effect is repeated once.

name: Million Loving Gaze
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: Increases the DMG dealt by the wielder by [StateArg1]% of their Attack. If the current Realm is {Caro}, each time the {Devour} effect is triggered, it further increases the DMG dealt by the wielder by 3% of their Attack.

name: Slumber Beneath the Glacier
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The Shield generated by the wielder +[StateArg1]%. After releasing the Posse, all Awakeners gain an additional [StateArg2]% Temporary Crit. Rate and Crit. DMG, but incur a {Sacrifice} of 3% of Max HP. If the current Realm is {Aequor}, releasing the Posse will also increase {Tentacle DMG} by [StateArg3]% of the wielder's Attack.

name: Fate Roulette
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: Increases the wielder's Crit. Rate by [StateArg1]%. Gain [StateArg2] Black Sigil upon killing an enemy, up to 3 times during exploration. After 3 triggers, the wielder's Crit. Rate permanently increases by [StateArg3]% for the rest of the exploration.

name: Gateway of Truth
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After the start of the battle, gain Keyflare equal to [StateArg1]% of the wielder's Keyflare Regen. The first Posse issuance in each battle repeats this effect.

name: Never-Ending Performance
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: At turn end, the wielder gains 5 Aliemus. After the wielder releases Exalt, the next Command Card played by the wielder this turn increases its Crit. Rate, Crit. DMG, Shield, and health recovery by [StateArg1]%.

name: Shepherd's Staff
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: At the start of the battle, the equipped gains Aliemus equal to [StateArg1]% of the wielder Aliemus Regen. After the equipped releases Exalt for the first time in each battle, this effect repeats once.

name: Blue Stone Throne
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: At the start of the battle, grant the "Immortal Dominion" effect to all Command Cards in the Draw Pile with Arithmetica consumption greater than or equal to 3. This card has the {Retain} effect. After being played, all Awakeners temporarily increase their Crit. Rate by [StateArg1]% and remove "Immortal Dominion." If the current Realm is {Aequor}, gain 1 Arithmetica after "Immortal Dominion" is removed.

name: Hypnotic Pendulum
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: Increases the wielder's Keyflare Regen by [StateArg1]%. At the start of the first battle, apply 1 stack of {Weakness} and {Vulnerable} to all enemies.

name: Macabre Delicacies
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Base DMG +[StateArg1]%. Whenever the wielder kills an enemy, accumulate {Crimson Furnace} equal to [StateArg2]% of the wielder's ATK if the current Realm is {Caro}.

name: Witch's Wide-brimmed Hat
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The Base DMG dealt by the first Command Card used by the wielder each turn is increased by [StateArg1]%. If they enter the {Ultra Space}, the wielder gains [StateArg2] Aliemus.

name: Blue-Ringed Toxin
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Keyflare Regen, Exalt Final DMG & Shield +[StateArg1]%.

name: Lone Feather
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Shield Generation increases by [StateArg1]%. Gain Shield equal to [StateArg2]% of the wielder's DEF at turn end, which increases by 2% of the wielder's DEF per turn.

name: The Divus' Visage
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: In the {Ultra Round}: Gain 3 stacks of "Alight". When the wielder plays a Command Card, consume 1 stack to increase its Final DMG and Shield Generation by [StateArg1]%.

name: Navigator at Sea
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: At the start of battle, gain a Shield equal to [StateArg1]% of the wielder's DEF. After triggering {Death Resistance}, trigger this effect again at the start of next turn.

name: Thirsting Brush
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After the wielder unleashes Exalt, they gain 1 stack of "Collaboration". The next Exalt of other Awakeners this turn can consume "Collaboration", increasing its Crit. Rate by [StateArg1]%, and the Awakener consuming "Collaboration" gains Aliemus equal to [StateArg1]% the wielder's Aliemus Regen.

name: Impending Sun
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Base DMG is boosted by [StateArg1]%. After playing 5 Command Cards from the wielder, the wielder gains [StateArg2]% Temporary Crit. Rate. This effect can only trigger once per turn.

name: Light of Intellect
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After the first Posse release in each turn, there is a [StateArg1]% chance to draw 1 Strike of the wielder's.

name: Magnolia's Lure
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The Fixed {Poison} & {Poison} Trigger effects caused by the wielder +[StateArg1]%. The wielder gains [StateArg2] Aliemus the first time they trigger {Resonance} each turn.

name: Imprisoned Madness
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: When switching to the {Raging Waves} stance, gain Temporary Realm Mastery equal to [StateArg1]% of your current Realm Mastery. 3-turn cooldown.

name: Spring in Yakutsk
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: At turn end, the wielder gains [StateArg1] Aliemus and Keyflare equal to their Keyflare Regen.

name: Sunfall
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Base DMG, {Poison}, and {Counter} are increased by [StateArg1]%. Crit. Rate and Crit. DMG are increased by [StateArg2]%.

name: Birth of a Soul
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The team's Max HP increases by 10%. The Healing and Shield provided by the wielder increase by [StateArg3]%. After playing the wielder's Strike, restore [StateArg1]% of lost HP. After playing the wielder's Defense, gain Shield equal to [StateArg2]% of current life. This effect can trigger up to 1 time each per turn.

name: Dusk and Dawn
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: Gain [StateArg1] Keyflare at turn end. Gain [StateArg2] Keyflare after triggering {Death Resistance}. Using Emergency Gnosis increases Arithmetica cap by 3 and allows you to draw 3 cards per turn.

name: Heart of Silver
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: Upon releasing Posse, gain [StateArg1]% of the wielder's ATK as {STR} and Shield equal to [StateArg2]% of their DEF. Upon using an Emergency Gnosis, all Awakeners gain [StateArg3] Aliemus at turn end.

name: Annihilated Rebirth
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After the wielder releases Exalt, the Base DMG of Exalt is increased by [StateArg1]%, Shield and HP Recovery are increased by [StateArg2]%, stacking up to 5 times. After completing exploration, the Affinity gained by the wielder increases by [StateArg3]%.

name: We Will Meet Again
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After switching Tentacle Stances, using {Crimson Furnace}, or unleashing {Annihilation}, draw the wielder's Command Card ×1; each effect has a cooldown of 3 turns. After the Exploration, all Awakeners in the team gain +[StateArg1]% Affinity.
